title: 少しずつ伸びてるから！

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Okay! That does it for morning practice! I've
gotta head to my test...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Nothing's wrong or anything. I'm a whole different
me today, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Jordan. If we don't start studying, we'll have
to take extra classes...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I hope you're ready. We're going all out.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh, are you okay, City? This isn't like you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine! First up is classical literature! Write the
correct word in each bracket!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, okay... An axe for cutting bamboo... Umm...
tomahawk?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Look at the word bank. There's no tomahawk
there, is there?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, like... What's really going on with you?
Why are you suddenly so serious?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You realize you've changed, right? You've been
taking your training seriously.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So I was just thinking... it'd be a shame if you had
to waste time on taking make-up classes.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: City... Are you trying to be... hunky?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: If that's the case, I'll do it! I'll take it so seriously this time!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
All right, then. Look at the word bank page I
mentioned before.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, here it is. I didn't realize this page was there.
But yikes, there's a bunch of stuff listed. Like, kill
me now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You need to memorize all of that.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...For real?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, since City has been training me so seriously,
there's, like, no way I can mess this up.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to go slay! Here I come, test!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Jordan's exam scores still on my mind, I go
to grab some food, when who should appear but
exactly the person I'm thinking of.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sorry. Were you waiting long?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There you are. Okay, time for my big
announcement!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Good timing, Trainer. You should hear this too.
Here goes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hold my breath as I wait to hear how it went.
And...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I got a fourteen!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey! That's... That's...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Double your last score!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Thank you sooo much, City!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That axe thing you taught me was on the test too.
I was the first one finished!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Right? Now you can aim even higher next time!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's fine! This is huge progress for her.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's not like she can change completely all at
once. Any improvement is good.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I usually have no clue what's going on, but I
felt like I understood at least a few things this
time! And it's all thanks to City!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Gold City's help, Tosen Jordan was able to
really try hard on her test. If there's one thing I
can tell her now, it's...
choice_data_list: Let's review the questions you missed!
Let's review the questions you missed!
It's great you could answer so quickly!
It's great you could answer so quickly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Gold City's help, Tosen Jordan was able to
really try hard on her test. If there's one thing I
can tell her now, it's...
choice_data_list: Let's review the questions you missed!
Let's review the questions you missed!
It's great you could answer so quickly!
It's great you could answer so quickly!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, what? You mean right now?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's more effective if you review while the
questions are fresh in your mind.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
How about this? If you can avoid getting extra
classes, I'll take you shopping. What do you
think?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on! No fair!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Okay, fine! I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, since you're all worried about me, I've
gotta work hard on the review too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Listen, City! I'm gonna do even better next time!
Just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you will. I can't wait to see what you can
do.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I know, right?! No one can answer faster than me!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Teachers always say to check your answers if you
have time left, right? But I never change any! It's
just like extra free time!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
The only thing left is to catch my accuracy up
with my speed.
choice_data_list: Well, that's certainly one way to look at it...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: At any rate, it's progress!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeeeah!
